KXNPBGAME-26JUL100500ORICHI-CHI.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
KXNPBGAME-26JUL100500ORICHI-CHI.rules_primary: If Chiba Lotte Marines wins the Orix Buffaloes vs Chiba Lotte Marines Japan NPB game originally scheduled for Jul 10, 2026 at 5:00 AM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
KXNPBGAME-26JUL100500ORICHI-CHI.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Orix Buffaloes vs Chiba Lotte Marines Japan NPB game originally scheduled for Jul 10, 2026 at 5:00 AM EDT. If this game is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled game has finished (within two days). If the game is cancelled or rescheduled to over two days away, the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules. If the game ends in a tie the markets will resolve to 50/50.
